title: Transaction Balance and Limit Validation
description: The system shall validate that a transaction amount does not exceed the user's available balance before processing any transaction.
rationale: Preventing overdraw or limit exceedance ensures financial integrity and customer trust by adhering to established rules and limits.
business_value: Maintaining accurate balances and preventing limit breaches reduces operational risks and improves customer satisfaction.

source.description: As a user I need my transactions to respect the available balance and daily withdrawal limits so that overdraw or limit exceedance is prevented.

acceptance_criteria: The transaction amount does not exceed the available balance.
The cumulative daily withdrawals including this transaction do not exceed the daily limit.
preconditions: The user has an available balance.
The user has a daily withdrawal limit set.
postconditions: The transaction is processed successfully if it meets both balance and limit criteria.
The transaction is denied with an appropriate message if either balance or limit criteria are not met.
functional_constraints: Transactions exceeding the available balance are denied.
Daily withdrawal totals including this transaction cannot exceed the daily limit.
edge_cases: User tries to make a transaction equal to their available balance.
Daily withdrawal limit is exactly met during a single day.

interfaces.name: User Balance and Limit Database
interfaces.description: The system interacts with this database to retrieve the user's available balance and daily withdrawal limit.

test_cases.description: Valid transaction amount below available balance.
Invalid transaction amount exceeds available balance.
test_cases.expected_result: Transaction is denied with a message indicating overdrawn account.

test_cases.description: Valid daily withdrawal that brings total to limit.
Invalid transaction amount exceeds daily withdrawal limit.
test_cases.expected_result: Transaction is denied with a message indicating daily withdrawal limit exceeded.
